description: A detailed, multi-shot prompt designed for Seedance 2 to generate a cinematic street racing sequence at night, focusing on intense driver focus, dynamic camera work, and explosive acceleration, struct

description_i18n.zh-CN: 为 Seedance 2 设计的多镜头提示词，生成夜间电影级街头赛车场景，聚焦驾驶员专注度、动态镜头运动和爆发式加速效果。
description_i18n.zh-TW: 為 Seedance 2 設計的多鏡頭提示詞，生成夜間電影級街頭賽車場景，聚焦駕駛專注度、動態鏡頭運動和爆發式加速效果。
description_i18n.ja: Seedance 2 向けの複数ショットプロンプトで、夜間のシネマティックなストリートレーシングシーンを生成。ドライバーの集中力、ダイナミックなカメラワーク、爆発的な加速を重視。
description_i18n.ko: Seedance 2용 멀티샷 프롬프트로 야간 시네마틱 스트리트 레이싱 장면 생성. 운전자의 집중력, 역동적인 카메라 워크, 폭발적인 가속에 초점.
description_i18n.de: Ein Multi-Shot-Prompt für Seedance 2 zur Generierung filmischer Straßenrennen-Szenen bei Nacht mit Fokus auf Fahrerkonzentration, dynamische Kameraarbeit und explosive Beschleunigung.
description_i18n.fr: Prompt multi-plans pour Seedance 2 générant une séquence de course de rue cinématographique nocturne, axée sur la concentration du pilote, les mouvements de caméra dynamiques et l'accélération explosive.
description_i18n.ru: Многокадровый промпт для Seedance 2, создающий ночную кинематографическую сцену уличных гонок с акцентом на концентрацию водителя, динамичную камеру и взрывное ускорение.
description_i18n.es: Prompt de múltiples tomas para Seedance 2 que genera una secuencia cinematográfica de carreras callejeras nocturnas, enfocada en la concentración del conductor, trabajo de cámara dinámico y aceleración explosiva.
description_i18n.pt-BR: Prompt multi-cena para Seedance 2 que gera uma sequência cinematográfica de corrida de rua noturna, focando na concentração do piloto, movimentos de câmera dinâmicos e aceleração explosiva.
description_i18n.it: Prompt multi-inquadratura per Seedance 2 che genera una sequenza cinematografica di corse di strada notturne, incentrata sulla concentrazione del pilota, riprese dinamiche e accelerazione esplosiva.
description_i18n.vi: Prompt đa cảnh cho Seedance 2 tạo chuỗi cảnh đua xe đường phố điện ảnh ban đêm, tập trung vào sự tập trung của tài xế, góc quay động và gia tốc bùng nổ.
description_i18n.pl: Wieloujęciowy prompt dla Seedance 2 generujący filmową sekwencję nocnych wyścigów ulicznych, skupiającą się na koncentracji kierowcy, dynamicznej pracy kamery i eksplozyjnym przyspieszeniu.
description_i18n.id: Prompt multi-shot untuk Seedance 2 yang menghasilkan sekuens balap jalanan sinematik di malam hari, fokus pada konsentrasi pengemudi, kerja kamera dinamis, dan akselerasi eksplosif.
description_i18n.nl: Een multi-shot prompt voor Seedance 2 om een filmische nachtelijke straatrace-sequentie te genereren, gericht op bestuurdersfocus, dynamisch camerawerk en explosieve acceleratie.
description_i18n.ar: موجه متعدد اللقطات لـ Seedance 2 لإنشاء مشهد سينمائي لسباق الشوارع الليلي، مع التركيز على تركيز السائق وحركة الكاميرا الديناميكية والتسارع المتفجر.
description_i18n.tr: Seedance 2 için çok çekimli prompt, gece sinematik sokak yarışı sekansı oluşturur; sürücü odaklanması, dinamik kamera çalışması ve patlayıcı hızlanma üzerine yoğunlaşır.
description_i18n.uk: Багатокадровий промпт для Seedance 2, що створює нічну кінематографічну послідовність вуличних перегонів з акцентом на концентрацію водія, динамічну камеру та вибухове прискорення.
description_i18n.en: A detailed, multi-shot prompt designed for Seedance 2 to generate a cinematic street racing sequence at night, focusing on intense driver focus, dynamic camera work, and explosive acceleration, struct

query.en:
cinematic street racing sequence at night, a focused driver inside a high-performance car grips the steering wheel, intense eye focus, city lights reflecting on windshield, tension building before sudden acceleration

camera: rapid multi-angle system with seamless transitions, interior close-up → over-the-shoulder → exterior tracking → low ground shots, ultra dynamic camera movement, whip pans + speed ramp transitions + motion blur masking cuts, continuous flow illusion

(0-2s) interior close-up on driver, hand tightens on gear shift, subtle breathing, dashboard lights glowing
(2-4s) over-the-shoulder shot, road ahead stretching into neon-lit city, engine vibration building
(4-6s) extreme close-up on finger pressing NOS button, instant ignition reaction
(6-8s) explosive acceleration, camera snaps to exterior side tracking shot, car launches forward with violent speed surge
(8-10s) ultra low ground shot near asphalt, wheels spinning at extreme velocity, environment streaking past
(10-12s) high-speed chase through tight streets, sharp turns, camera whip pans between angles, reflections and light trails enhancing speed

Dense urban night environment, wet asphalt reflecting neon lights, tunnel passages, street lights streaking, high-speed city atmosphere
Ultra realistic, fast and furious inspired energy, photorealistic lighting, intense motion blur, high contrast neon reflections, cinematic depth of field, extreme sense of speed, fluid transitions, no distortion, no stretching
